semantic.role: Vitest unit test enforcing architectural module boundaries for the view service layer.
responsibilities: Validates that view runtime and rendering modules are correctly placed under src/services/view directory.
Asserts existence of specific view module files: view-renderer.ts, arch-diagram-renderer.ts, view-registry.ts, view-runtime.ts.
Ensures that view-renderer.ts is not incorrectly placed in src/infra directory, enforcing layer separation.
outOfScope: Testing the functionality of the view modules themselves.
Validating the content or correctness of the module files.
Enforcing naming conventions other than file location.
invariants: Must be a test file (uses Vitest framework).
Must rely on Node.js fs and path modules for file system assertions.
Must assert on the physical file structure of the repository.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Enforce clean separation between service layer (view) and infrastructure layer by validating file placement.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactoring to modularize CLI and decouple core infra services (from git intent). This test likely supports that refactor by guarding against incorrect module placement.

outOfScope: Testing the functionality of the view modules themselves.
